title: article — one candidate story from a retrieval run
description: Arrives as status=candidate from tools/fetch_sources.py or tools/land_stories.py; the semantic filter (capabilities/semantic-filter.md) judges it and tools/record_verdict.py persists the verdict — always with a filter_reason (OVERVIEW rule 2). Included stories get a summary before they can appear in an issue. One record per URL, ever (rule 1).

url.description: The story's canonical link — the dedup key: one record per URL, ever.

source_name.description: Where it came from, display form — e.g. arXiv, OpenAI News, Hacker News, web.

published.description: As given by the source — feeds vary; may be a date, a timestamp, or empty.

authors.description: Display form, when the source gives one.

excerpt.description: The source's own abstract/summary/description, plain text.

filter_reason.description: Why this story was included or excluded — required once status leaves candidate (enforced in validate.py).

summary.description: Plain-language summary for the newsletter — included stories only.

run_id.description: The retrieval run that landed this story — its provenance (referential integrity in validate.py).
